name: Linux Package Search
description: Sucht ein Paket über den verfügbaren Paketmanager.

commands.bash: if command -v apt-cache >/dev/null 2>&1; then apt-cache search {{.PackageName}}; elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then dnf search {{.PackageName}}; elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then yum search {{.PackageName}}; else echo 'No supported package manager found'; fi
commands.wsl: if command -v apt-cache >/dev/null 2>&1; then apt-cache search {{.PackageName}}; elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then dnf search {{.PackageName}}; elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then yum search {{.PackageName}}; else echo 'No supported package manager found'; fi
commands.zsh: if command -v apt-cache >/dev/null 2>&1; then apt-cache search {{.PackageName}}; elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then dnf search {{.PackageName}}; elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then yum search {{.PackageName}}; else echo 'No supported package manager found'; fi
